scripts.setup: yarn install --immutable && yarn get-secrets rpx-aat && yarn pwinstall && yarn playwright install webkit && yarn playwright install firefox
scripts.test:api: API_LOG_LEVEL=${API_LOG_LEVEL:-fatal} PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT=api PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_CONSOLE_TEST_OUTPUT=false PW_ODHIN_TEST_OUTPUT=only-on-failure PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS=list,odhin yarn playwright test --project=api
scripts.test:api:pw: API_LOG_LEVEL=${API_LOG_LEVEL:-fatal} PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT=api PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_CONSOLE_TEST_OUTPUT=false PW_ODHIN_TEST_OUTPUT=only-on-failure yarn playwright test --project=api
scripts.test:api:ci: API_LOG_LEVEL=${API_LOG_LEVEL:-fatal} PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT=api PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_CONSOLE_TEST_OUTPUT=false PW_ODHIN_TEST_OUTPUT=only-on-failure PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS=list,odhin,junit yarn playwright test --project=api
scripts.test:api:coverage: rm -rf coverage && (API_LOG_LEVEL=${API_LOG_LEVEL:-fatal} PLAYWRIGHT_PROJECT=api PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_CONSOLE_TEST_OUTPUT=false PW_ODHIN_TEST_OUTPUT=only-on-failure PW_ODHIN_LINK_COVERAGE=true PLAYWRIGHT_REPORTERS=list,odhin,junit yarn c8 --reporter=lcov --reporter=json-summary --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary --reporter=html --report-dir ./coverage playwright test --project=api || true) && (node ./scripts/reportCoverage.cjs || true) && (PLAYWRIGHT_REPORT_FOLDER=functional-output/tests/playwright-api/odhin-report PW_ODHIN_LINK_COVERAGE=true node ./scripts/copy-odhin-report.cjs || true)
